title: ConsistencyScoreCard
description: Quantitative validation scorecard produced by M49 QuantitativeValidationRunner. Compares computed observables against external targets using pull statistics. All toy targets carry targetProvenance='synthetic-toy-v1' and evidenceTier='toy-placeholder'.

studyId.description: Unique study identifier for this validation run

matches.description: All target match records from this validation run

totalPassed.description: Number of target comparisons where pull <= sigmaThreshold

totalFailed.description: Number of target comparisons where pull > sigmaThreshold

overallScore.description: Fraction of comparisons that passed: totalPassed / (totalPassed + totalFailed). NaN if no matches.

calibrationPolicyId.description: ID of the CalibrationPolicy used for this run

targetLabel.description: Human-readable label for the target (e.g., particle name or ratio description)

targetValue.description: Target reference value. For toy studies, use eigenvalue ratios normalized to largest eigenvalue.

targetUncertainty.description: Target 1-sigma uncertainty. Set to a large value for toy-placeholder targets.

computedValue.description: Computed observable value from the GU pipeline

computedUncertainty.description: Computed total uncertainty. -1 means unestimated (never zero).

pull.description: Pull statistic: |computed - target| / sqrt(sigma_computed^2 + sigma_target^2). If sigma_computed=-1 (unestimated), uses sigma_target only in denominator.

passed.description: True if pull <= sigmaThreshold from the calibration policy (default 5.0)

QuantitativeUncertainty.description: Four independent uncertainty sources. Each field is -1 if unestimated (never zero). Total = sqrt(sum of squares of estimated components).

branchVariation.description: Uncertainty from branch choice variation. -1 = unestimated.

refinementError.description: Uncertainty from finite mesh refinement (discretization error). -1 = unestimated.

extractionError.description: Uncertainty from the extraction/fitting method (e.g., eigenvalue ratio extraction). -1 = unestimated.

totalUncertainty.description: Total uncertainty = sqrt(branchVariation^2 + refinementError^2 + extractionError^2 + environmentSensitivity^2) over estimated components only. -1 if no components estimated.

sigmaThreshold.description: Maximum allowed pull for a comparison to pass

requireFullUncertainty.description: If true, fail any observable with unestimated computed uncertainty

observableId.description: Observable ID this target applies to

value.description: Target value. For toy studies, use eigenvalue ratios (normalize to largest eigenvalue), not raw eigenvalues.

source.description: Provenance string. Must be 'synthetic-toy-v1' for all Phase V toy targets.

evidenceTier.description: Evidence tier. Must be 'toy-placeholder' for all Phase V toy targets. Never 'physical-prediction'.
